text.tspan: A formidable serpentine monstrosity, the Stoneygaze Guardian lurks within
forgotten ruins, its reptilian scales a mosaic of emerald and deep green, topped
with a vibrant, iridescent feathered crest. Its eyes glow with a chilling,
unnatural green light, capable of turning intruders to stone with a single,
dreadful glance. Its hardened hide bears numerous scars, testament to its
territorial ferocity and the battles it has waged to protect its ancient domain.
• Summoned from code, forged in commits
